ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, slightly disrupting persona consistency with the use of "strict style."
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>This arm has good context relevance and maintains persona but lacks naturalness in its formality.

The response is highly relevant, consistent with a merchant persona who values discretion and fair exchange; it's natural-sounding dialogue that fits the context of seeking access to restricted areas. The overall quality stands out as excellent due to its effectiveness in maintaining character integrity while addressing player input appropriately within this dynamic setting.
